tours.title: Grand Tour of Italy
tours.description: Explore the best of Italy, from Rome to Venice, Florence, and Milan. Discover iconic landmarks, art, and delicious cuisine.

tours.title: Japanese Cultural Adventure
tours.description: Immerse yourself in the beauty and tradition of Japan. Visit Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka, experiencing temples, gardens, and authentic Japanese cuisine.

tours.title: Australian Outback Safari
tours.description: Experience the rugged beauty of the Australian Outback. Travel to Ayers Rock, Kakadu National Park, and Alice Springs, taking in breathtaking landscapes and wildlife.

tours.title: Safari in Kenya
tours.description: Go on an unforgettable safari through Kenya's stunning savannahs. See lions, elephants, and giraffes in their natural habitat across Maasai Mara and Amboseli.

tours.title: French Riviera & Provence
tours.description: Discover the elegance of the French Riviera and the charm of Provence. Enjoy visits to Nice, Cannes, and the vineyards of Provence.

tours.title: Patagonian Explorer
tours.description: Adventure through Patagonia, exploring Argentina's and Chile's majestic mountains, glaciers, and lakes. Ideal for nature lovers and hiking enthusiasts.
